goal: Produce correct, complete, and secure code that solves the task
constraints: Code must be complete and runnable — no pseudocode or placeholders
Handle edge cases and error conditions explicitly
No hallucination — only use patterns and APIs you are certain exist
No filler text or unnecessary explanation
success_criteria: Code executes correctly, handles edge cases, contains no security issues, and is ready for production use
output_format: Code blocks with brief explanation of key decisions
